ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the monitoring station was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* The date when the station's sensors were last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* The entity or department responsible for the station */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., inflow, outflow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* The high threshold value for the data type, used for generating alerts */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* The low threshold value for the data type, used for generating alerts */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., inflow, outflow) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "flow" REAL /* Water flow rate in cubic meters per second */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity in parts per thousand */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* The pH level of the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* The turbidity of the water in NTU (Nephelometric Turbidity Units) */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* The dissolved oxygen level in mg/L */,
  "nitrate_level" REAL /* The nitrate level in mg/L */,
  "chlorophyll_a" REAL /* The chlorophyll-a concentration in μg/L */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* The electrical conductivity of the water in μS/cm */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* The battery level of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* A flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  "source_device_id" TEXT /* The unique identifier of the device that collected the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., flow, temperature, salinity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* The serial number of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* The date when the next calibration is due */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* The type of battery used in the sensor */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* The expected battery life in days or hours */,
  "data_logging_interval" TEXT /* The interval at which the sensor logs data */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* The date when the sensor was last tested */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* The result of the last test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "installation_depth" TEXT /* The depth at which the sensor is installed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the access in seconds */,
  "data_volume" TEXT /* The volume of data accessed in bytes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high flow, low temperature) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_category" TEXT /* The category of the alert (e.g., water quality, environmental, operational) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user responsible for addressing the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* The date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* The type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, repair, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* The cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* The status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, in progress, scheduled) */,
  "next_maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* The date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
